name.en: National Institute of Statistics of Romania (INSSE)

description.en: The National Institute of Statistics (INSSE) is Romania's principal government agency responsible for collecting, processing, and disseminating official statistical data. It provides comprehensive national statistics covering demographics, economic indicators, industrial production, agriculture, trade, education, health, and living standards through the TEMPO Online interactive database.
description.zh: 罗马尼亚国家统计局（INSSE）是负责收集、处理和发布官方统计数据的主要政府机构。通过TEMPO Online交互式数据库提供涵盖人口、经济指标、工业生产、农业、贸易、教育、卫生和生活水平的全面国家统计数据。

en: Consumer Price Index (CPI) and inflation data
Foreign trade statistics by commodity and partner country
zh: 消费者价格指数（CPI）和通胀数据
人口普查和人口统计数据
工业生产和建筑业指数
按商品和伙伴国分类的对外贸易统计
劳动力市场和就业数据
